title: Marketa Activation Engine P1+P2 applied, validated, corrected (RQH canister + Passport Bureau wired)
body: Applied all Codex source packets for the Marketa Activation Engine inside the Marketa cartridge. Corrections per operator mandate: reputation route reads the RQH ICP canister as authoritative (Supabase reputation_bucket demoted to cache/mirror); new passport handoff route wired to the completed Polity Passport Bureau (syncs application status + issued ppp-* id, prepares draft applications without faking operator consents); classifyLegalTrack fixed so Polity Legal Aid candidates are not mislabelled high-yield (bare 'legal' substring excluded). 6/6 marketa-activation tests + 35/35 passport-bureau canaries pass. Migration 20260610000000_marketa_activation_engine.sql must be run on dev Supabase.
